task: Teach the VS Code bridge to auto-discover the backend-generated local desktop connection profile so users no longer need to manually copy the backend WebSocket URL and token for the local product path.
constraints: Do not change backend WebSocket protocol.
Do not persist profile token into VS Code global settings automatically.
Prefer explicit VS Code settings over the local profile when both exist.
done_when: Bridge resolves backend URL and auth token from the ignored local profile when VS Code settings are empty.
Explicit VS Code settings and environment variables still take precedence.
Runtime tests cover profile path resolution and expiry behavior.
